mano_cua.result_summary: Carbon Ads 广告组件在 1024x768 小桌面分辨率下严重遮挡页面内容。广告组件使用 position:fixed 定位，白色背景框覆盖了页面右半部分的主要内容区域。副标题'The Tourist Guide into your React...'被截断，Introduction 段落文字被广告框直接覆盖，滚动页面后广告仍固定遮挡不同区域的内容。页面其他元素无法正常查看。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Carbon Ads component is position:fixed with a white background box that overlaps the main content text area. The ad covers approximately the right half of the page content. The subtitle text gets cut off, introduction paragraph text is directly overlaid by the ad box. As user scrolls, the fixed ad continues to cover different content areas. This is a clear layout bug at small desktop resolutions.
